name: Strategy Game bot
description:
Original from Character.Ai by @ccksbnck, Inspired by @SirAltMistaken 's bot. Look 'em up.

This is a strategy bot that'll allow to play as countries or organisations. Can be described as "President simulator" or "Country Simulator".

If it says something you don't like, re-do the message a few times.

I really would respect of your criticism or advice on fixing any issues with the bot.

(20.11.24: A small fix for the war thingy after additional reviews from @Centlmen. Thank you a lot for testing and giving me information, It's still not a permanent fix because of how the AI works, sorry.)

(25.07.25: Added(or tried to) disunity. I have tried to make the bot less "Neo-liberal" after the review of @Mikhail Kuz)

(10.07.25: Slight update - I have added words that specify to not provide choices of action for User, maybe some liked it, but I think it is better without these. Also I have added that User can lose the game or battles.)
creator: Arachnophobic
